description: Portable, opt-in snapshot of the Athena Investment Intelligence build. NOT auto-loaded by Athena — restore explicitly via restore.py.

athena_invest.note: Reference constitution, 8 agent specs, mandate template, PROGRESS.md. Live OAuth tokens deliberately EXCLUDED.

schwab_plugin.note: Schwab market-data + OAuth + trader plugin. __pycache__ excluded. Token-gated; inert until credentials present.

scripts.note: schwab_token_health_check.py watchdog used by the token-health cron.

secrets_required_after_restore.note: Secrets are NOT exported. Re-add them on the new host, then re-run the OAuth consent flow (plugin README) to mint fresh tokens. Old tokens do not transfer.

cron_jobs_to_recreate.name: Schwab token health (athena-market-data)
cron_jobs_to_recreate.note: Recreate with: athena cron, or the cronjob tool. Retarget delivery to Telegram once the gateway is configured.

post_restore_checklist: Run OAuth consent (see plugins/schwab_marketdata/README.md) to mint tokens.
